title: Choosing the Wrong Language Costs AI Teams Months of Work
summary: Darren argues that programming language choice significantly impacts AI team productivity and code quality. Dynamic languages like Python introduce runtime risks that become more dangerous with AI-assisted coding, while TypeScript with LSPs, type checking, and build-time validation catches errors earlier and scales better for larger teams.
